response.justification: Bogdan is a highly capable engineer with 20 years of experience and MIT credentials, demonstrating technical leadership across multiple domains. However, he falls short of the core requirement for a Principal Engineer focused on AI Strategy—the role demands recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI, and his recent AI work (April 2025) on agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks is too nascent to establish strategic credibility. His background is strong but specialized in traditional software engineering, not AI/ML innovation or customer-facing technology strategy.
strengths: 20 years of full-stack software engineering across web, mobile, embedded systems, and infrastructure with multiple staff-level leadership roles
MIT CS degree and demonstrated thought leadership through workshops, conference talks, and open-source projects (GISCollective, Trial, Fluent-Asserts)
Recent exposure to AI infrastructure (MCP code generators, agentic workflows) showing awareness of cutting-edge patterns and willingness to pivot into AI
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products or platforms—current AI work is recent (April 2025) and infrastructure-focused, not strategic product innovation or expertise
Missing preferred qualification of Master's or PhD in AI-related field; background lacks ML, statistics, or AI theory foundation typical for strategic AI roles
No evidence of advising strategic customers or partners on technology adoption; career focused on hands-on engineering rather than C-level or enterprise strategy

key_factors.factor: Limited demonstrated AI expertise and products
Strong technical foundation and 20 years of engineering leadership
Very recent entry into AI infrastructure work
